name: Acrobatics
description: Balance, tumble, and move with grace and agility. Perform aerial maneuvers, maintain balance on unstable surfaces, and execute acrobatic tricks.

name: Climb
description: Scale walls, cliffs, and other vertical surfaces using strength and technique. Navigate climbing obstacles and traverse difficult terrain.

name: Deception
description: Mislead others through false information, disguises, and clever feints. Create convincing lies and manipulate perceptions.

name: Endurance
description: Persist through fatigue, harsh environmental conditions, and physical exertion. Resist exhaustion and push beyond normal limits.

name: Gather Information
description: Find rumors, local knowledge, and information through investigation and networking. Identify useful contacts and gather intelligence.

name: Initiative
description: React quickly to sudden events and threats. Determine action order in combat and seize tactical advantages.

name: Jump
description: Leap across gaps and reach higher ground using strength and timing. Execute long and high jumps with precision.

name: Knowledge (Bureaucracy)
description: Understand government systems, regulations, and administrative procedures. Navigate bureaucratic processes and identify legal precedents.

name: Knowledge (Galactic Lore)
description: Know the history, cultures, and nations of the galaxy. Identify alien species and understand galactic affairs.

name: Knowledge (Life Sciences)
description: Understand biology, medicine, and living organisms. Identify creatures, treat illnesses, and understand life processes.

name: Knowledge (Physical Sciences)
description: Know physics, chemistry, and astronomy. Understand natural phenomena and scientific principles.

name: Knowledge (Social Sciences)
description: Understand cultures, societies, and human behavior. Know customs, psychology, and social structures.

name: Knowledge (Tactics)
description: Master military strategy and combat tactics. Anticipate enemy movements and coordinate group tactics.

name: Knowledge (Technology)
description: Understand technology, computers, and engineering. Identify devices, repair systems, and work with droids.

name: Mechanics
description: Repair, maintain, and modify mechanical and electronic devices. Build contraptions and disable mechanisms.

name: Perception
description: Notice details and observe surroundings carefully. Spot hidden objects, ambushes, and subtle details.

name: Persuasion
description: Convince others through argument and charm. Change attitudes, negotiate deals, and inspire cooperation.

name: Pilot
description: Control and maneuver starships and vehicles. Execute evasive maneuvers, dock, and navigate hazardous space.

name: Stealth
description: Move unseen and unheard. Hide from enemies, blend into crowds, and move silently through shadows.

name: Survival
description: Survive in harsh environments and track prey. Find food and water, navigate wilderness, and predict weather.

name: Swim
description: Move through water with control and speed. Navigate aquatic environments and hold breath in dangerous conditions.

name: Treat Injury
description: Provide medical care to heal wounds and cure diseases. Stabilize dying characters and perform surgery.

name: Use Computer
description: Operate computer systems, hack networks, and access data. Control droids and reprogram devices remotely.

name: Use the Force
description: Channel the Force to accomplish feats beyond normal ability. Sense presences, move objects, and influence minds.
